gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/252)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/252)
text: مَنْ كَانَ مَعَهُ كَفَنُهُ فِي بَيْتِهِ لَمْ يُكْتَبْ مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ وَ كَانَ مَأْجُوراً كُلَّمَا نَظَرَ إِلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from the one who informed him,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who was with his shroud in his house would never be written as being from the oblivious ones, and he would be Recompensed every time he looks towards it’.
en.sarwar: 23. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from those who narrated to him who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that whoever keeps his shroud ready at his home is not considered a neglectful person. He is rewarded whenever he looks at it.”
